overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through an Arasaka corporate plaza transitioning into a covered roadway tunnel. The scene features distinctive red neon lighting, digital advertisements, and futuristic corporate architecture, progressing from dusk exterior to an artificially lit security checkpoint.

events.description: entering covered walkway from open plaza, transitioning from exterior to interior space
ambient natural light decreases significantly as moving deeper into the covered structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward the tunnel entrance, passing the Arasaka building

entered.detail: large black corporate building with white Arasaka logo and branding
white and red concrete barriers blocking off the sidewalk area
horizontal red neon light strips mounted on the building wall
overhead concrete structure covering the walkway ahead
tall modern street lamp post on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in an open corporate plaza at dusk, with the Arasaka building visible on the left. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk, passing concrete barriers and street lamps, transitioning into a covered walkway. The lighting shifts from natural dusk to artificial as the covered structure overhead blocks the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered corporate tunnel with red ambient lighting

events.description: white sports car drives past quickly on the left side of the road
steam or smoke begins emitting from vents on the left wall, creating atmospheric effect

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the dimly lit tunnel with red ambient lighting and steam effects

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving at high speed past the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: glass and metal walkway bridge spanning across the tunnel ceiling
wall vent emitting white steam or smoke onto the roadway
circular ventilation ducts mounted on the tunnel ceiling
dome security camera mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: Now fully inside the covered tunnel, the scene is illuminated by red neon strips along the walls. A white sports car speeds past on the road to the left. Steam vents activate on the left wall, adding atmospheric haze. The camera continues walking forward under the glass pedestrian bridge overhead.

events.description: large illuminated digital billboard reading 'SECURE YOUR SOUL' becomes visible on the right wall
another vehicle passes by on the road to the left

agents.ego_description: walking past digital advertisements and holographic road projections on the ground

entered.detail: large illuminated wall display with text 'SECURE YOUR SOUL' and 'RELIC' branding
blue and green holographic imagery projected onto the road surface
corporate advertisement for Arasaka Relic technology with red waveform graphics

segments.scene_description: The tunnel features prominent digital advertising, including a massive 'SECURE YOUR SOUL' billboard for Arasaka Relic on the right wall. Holographic projections illuminate the road surface with blue and green imagery. The camera continues forward as another vehicle passes by, with the steam effects fading behind.

events.description: intense red lighting illuminates the tunnel end as approaching the security checkpoint
approaching the brightly lit Arasaka security gate with large corporate logo

agents.ego_description: approaching the security checkpoint at the tunnel end, moving toward the bright red-lit exit

entered.detail: security gate structure with bright red lighting at the tunnel end
large illuminated Arasaka corporate logo mounted on the wall ahead
intense horizontal red neon beams and spotlights illuminating the checkpoint area
yellow and white striped barrier gates at the checkpoint entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the tunnel's end, dominated by intense red security lighting and the illuminated Arasaka logo on the wall ahead. The digital billboards and holographic displays fall behind as the camera moves toward the security checkpoint with its striped barriers and bright neon illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open corporate plaza at dusk into a claustrophobic, neon-lit security tunnel. It begins by moving along a sidewalk past concrete barriers and the Arasaka building, transitioning from the natural light of evening into a covered walkway that blocks out the sky. As the camera enters the tunnel, the environment shifts to an artificial red glow with steam venting from the walls and a white sports car speeding past under a glass pedestrian bridge. The scene then expands into a corridor of digital advertising, passing a massive Secure Your Soul billboard and holographic projections that cast blue and green light across the road. Finally, the camera moves toward the tunnel's end, where the holographic displays fade and are replaced by intense red security lighting and striped barriers at a corporate checkpoint.
